name: 2026-05-23 Political Commentary Dynasty Ban Loophole TH
description:
64% of Filipinos want political dynasties banned.

The version the House advanced this week covers only the second degree.

Kaya pwede pa ring tumakbo ang pinsan, pamangkin, at tito.

The Constitution ordered this ban in 1987. Almost 40 years later, the people writing the definition are the ones it would unseat.

That's not a ban. That's a loophole with a signature.

custom_fields.value:
64% of Filipinos want political dynasties banned.

The version the House advanced this week covers only the second degree.

Kaya pwede pa ring tumakbo ang pinsan, pamangkin, at tito.

The Constitution ordered this ban in 1987. Almost 40 years later, the people writing the definition are the ones it would unseat.

That's not a ban. That's a loophole with a signature.

64% of Filipinos want political dynasties banned.

The version the House advanced this week covers only the second degree.

Kaya pwede pa ring tumakbo ang pinsan, pamangkin, at tito.

The Constitution ordered this ban in 1987. Almost 40 years later, the people writing the definition are the ones it would unseat.

That's not a ban. That's a loophole with a signature.

House approved anti-political dynasty bill on 2nd reading May 20, 2026, limiting the ban to the 2nd degree of consanguinity/affinity (watered down from 4th degree); Pulse Asia March 2026 found 64% support. Sources: Rappler, BusinessWorld, GMA, Philstar, Inquirer, Tribune, Manila Bulletin.
